creator: alfred@FreeBSD.org
text:
yamagi,

It's likely that I will use your trick:

let userconfig=expand("~/.gvimrc")
if filereadable(userconfig)
	finish
endif
unlet userconfig

for gvimrc in about a week, just going to wait for some more people to weigh in for alternate solutions.

Is there however any reason why not to ONLY do that for the gvimrc since the vimrc issues can be resolved with the "set all&" ?

thank you.
